Source   Edit  

If T==U then compilation fails

Types

BiMap[T; U] = object
Bidirectional map for unique keys and values Source   Edit   
BiMapSeq[T; U] = object
Bidirectional map for unique values but shared keys Source   Edit  

Procs

proc `[]`[T, U](x: BiMap[T, U]; y: T): U {.inline.}

Forwards lookup

Where T == U then backwards lookups are done manually
